description:
Parse requirements.txt format:
- Handle pinned versions (package==1.2.3)
- Handle version ranges (package>=1.0,<2.0)
- Skip comments (#) and blank lines
- Handle -r includes for other requirement files
- Handle -e for editable installs (skip these)
- Handle environment markers (;python_version>='3.8')
- Handle extras (package[extra]==1.0)

Note: Pinned requirements.txt is preferred as it's deterministic.
title: Implement requirements.txt parsing
